message: build: scaffold XcodeGen app and hosted tests

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+import AppKit
+
+enum AppStatus: Equatable {
+    case loading
+    case ready
+    case recording
+    case transcribing
+    case cleaningUp
+    case error(String)
+
+    var menuTitle: String {
+        switch self {
+        case .loading:
+            return "Loading models..."
+        case .ready:
+            return "Ready"
+        case .recording:
+            return "Recording..."
+        case .transcribing:
+            return "Transcribing..."
+        case .cleaningUp:
+            return "Cleaning up..."
+        case let .error(message):
+            return message
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+enum StatusMenuIcon {
+    static func makeImage(for status: AppStatus) -> NSImage {
+        let image = NSImage(size: NSSize(width: 18, height: 18))
+        image.lockFocus()
+
+        let dotRect = NSRect(x: 4, y: 4, width: 10, height: 10)
+        let dotPath = NSBezierPath(ovalIn: dotRect)
+        iconColor(for: status).setFill()
+        dotPath.fill()
+
+        image.unlockFocus()
+        image.isTemplate = usesTemplateRendering(for: status)
+        return image
+    }
+
+    private static func iconColor(for status: AppStatus) -> NSColor {
+        switch status {
+        case .loading:
+            return .systemOrange
+        case .recording:
+            return .systemRed
+        case .error:
+            return .systemYellow
+        case .ready, .transcribing, .cleaningUp:
+            return .labelColor
+        }
+    }
+
+    private static func usesTemplateRendering(for status: AppStatus) -> Bool {
+        switch status {
+        case .recording:
+            return false
+        case .loading, .ready, .transcribing, .cleaningUp, .error:
+            return true
+        }
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,59 @@
+name: GhostPepper
+options:
+  bundleIdPrefix: com.github.matthartman
+  deploymentTarget:
+    macOS: "14.0"
+  xcodeVersion: "16.0"
+packages:
+  WhisperKit:
+    url: https://github.com/argmaxinc/WhisperKit.git
+    from: 0.16.0
+  FluidAudio:
+    url: https://github.com/FluidInference/FluidAudio.git
+    from: 0.12.4
+  LLMSwift:
+    url: https://github.com/obra/LLM.swift.git
+    branch: main
+  Sparkle:
+    url: https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle.git
+    from: 2.6.0
+targets:
+  GhostPepper:
+    type: application
+    platform: macOS
+    deploymentTarget: "14.0"
+    sources:
+      - path: Sources/App
+    dependencies:
+      - package: WhisperKit
+      - package: FluidAudio
+      - package: LLMSwift
+        product: LLM
+      - package: Sparkle
+    settings:
+      base:
+        PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER: com.github.matthartman.ghostpepper
+        PRODUCT_NAME: GhostPepper
+        GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE: NO
+        INFOPLIST_FILE: Sources/App/Info.plist
+        ASSETCATALOG_COMPILER_APPICON_NAME: AppIcon
+        MARKETING_VERSION: "1.9"
+        CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION: "10"
+        SWIFT_VERSION: "6.0"
+        CODE_SIGN_STYLE: Automatic
+  GhostPepperTests:
+    type: bundle.unit-test
+    platform: macOS
+    deploymentTarget: "14.0"
+    sources:
+      - path: Tests/GhostPepperTests
+    dependencies:
+      - target: GhostPepper
+    settings:
+      base:
+        PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER: com.github.matthartman.ghostpepper.tests
+        PRODUCT_NAME: GhostPepperTests
+        GENERATE_INFOPLIST_FILE: YES
+        TEST_HOST: $(BUILT_PRODUCTS_DIR)/GhostPepper.app/Contents/MacOS/GhostPepper
+        BUNDLE_LOADER: $(TEST_HOST)
+        SWIFT_VERSION: "6.0"
